MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-06-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES' AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT ALSO AWARDS REASONABLE ATTORNEY FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $1032 AND COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $540; $300 FOR COST OF PROCEEDINGS AND $300 FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE AGREEMENT FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT DUE AND OWING OF $639,996.74. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: ANN DELGADO, CSR # 11185, TEL. NO. (951)764-4047 (302/MJM)

RULING - THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES' AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed.
